author: mrrepac
description: A full calendar in a single Markdown note: month/week/day/agenda views with events, tasks, recurrence, colors, drag-to-reschedule and keyboard control, all stored in one code block. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: mrrepac
manifest.description: A calendar that lives in one Markdown note: a code block renders switchable month / week / day / agenda views — events and tasks, recurrence, colors, notes, drag-to-reschedule, keyboard control — and writes all data back into that same block.
manifest.name: MD Calendar

name: MD Calendar
